name_en: Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Woven"
name_cn:
Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Woven"
This Hobo Avenue mini bag is a new arrival from the Fall 2023 Ready-to-Wear collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a vintage charm. Crafted from natural-colored natural grass, it features a woven pattern and comes with two detachable pouches for practical versatility. The elegant design features a leather and chain strap finished with matching enamel CD links. It can be worn on the shoulder, adding a finishing touch to various looks this season.
Front featuring matching enamel CD logo
Spacious compartment
2 detachable pouches, one with a zip closure and 3 card slots
Chain strap section finished with matching enamel CD links
Model: 2366
Size: 21×13×5cm
